name: Onboard
description: Bootstrap control repo — detect provider validate auth create profile and auto-clone TargetProjects

name: New Domain
description: Create a domain-level initiative (collects domain name → track)

name: New Service
description: Create a service-level initiative within a domain (collects service name → track)

name: New Feature
description: Create a feature-level initiative within a service (collects feature name → track)

name: Switch
description: Switch to a different initiative via git checkout

name: Status
description: Show current initiative state derived from git

name: Next
description: Recommend next action based on lifecycle state

name: Promote
description: Promote current audience to next level with gate checks

name: Sense
description: Run cross-initiative overlap detection on demand

name: Module Management
description: Check module version and guide self-service updates

name: PrePlan
description: Start PrePlan phase — brainstorm research product brief

name: BusinessPlan
description: Start BusinessPlan phase — PRD creation UX design

name: TechPlan
description: Start TechPlan phase — architecture document technical decisions

name: DevProposal
description: Start DevProposal phase — epics stories readiness check

name: SprintPlan
description: Start SprintPlan phase — sprint-status story files

name: Dev
description: Delegate to implementation agents in target projects

name: Discover
description: Discover repos under TargetProjects — inspect for BMAD config update governance inventory create switch branches
